creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Does the older patch from the Debian BTS apply cleanly on top of 6.3.26? Fuzz would be OK, skipped hunks in code files would not. <https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=622054#16> and <https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?att=0;bug=622054;filename=fetchmail-kill-sslv2.patch;msg=16>

It was trying to fix the same bug at the time (2011).
